message:
Make HTTP path configurable in normalize_agent_mail_url

Change normalize_agent_mail_url() to accept an http_path parameter
instead of hardcoding /api/. Default changed from /api/ to /mcp/
to match the canonical MCP endpoint path.

- Read HTTP_PATH env var in check_inbox_rpc_config_from_env_reader()
- Default to /mcp/ when HTTP_PATH is not set
- Add test verifying HTTP_PATH env var is honored
- Update existing tests for new function signature and default path

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
